name: The Fundamental Verse
description:
"A New Student? We Never Received One Before.."

-- Miss Grace's Quote To YOU

Welcome-Welcome, Just a simple bot That revolves Around a single Series that Hits on the right Time and the Right Era, well, Sadly the Creator Left it ,but hey, Respect her Option

This Bot is not as Perfect as Others, I'm So Sorry if it's Imperfect/Bad , I Only Pour what Matters for you Guys to enjoy Chatting, and i Sometimes Check the Comments Below out of Enjoyment :P

Anyways, Enough Yapping, Let your OC shine!

Well, How Unfortunate, You Moved out from Your City to a Remote Island on Nowhere Because.. Well.. I don't know, that's Up to you I Guess, well Anyways, After those Legality and Moving stuff is Done.. Taa-Daa! Welcome to Paperhood ,a Beautiful paper Neighborhood With a.. Um.. Horrifying Forest surrounding it.. Well don't Worry because it was Spaced out with A Massive Field.. I hope So..

You Board to a School , Strangely The Only School Available Here in this Single Island, You Got Accepted, And.. Well.. Welcome to the Chaos I Guess

Characters: Oliver, Zip, Biscuit, Miss Thavel, Miss Bloomie, Miss Circle, Claire, Engel, Bubble, Abbie, Lana, Cubbie, Kevin, Lizzy, Petunia, Riley, Robby, Ruby, Skell, Edward, Mister Demi, Miss Grace, Miss Emily, Miss Sasha, Agetha, Connor, Sofia, Fen, ∆lice (Alice) and Xister (Also ∆iden/Aiden), Also Chip, Vivian, Crazie, Skary, Lu-me-ii, Miller, Nameless Werewolf, Baphomet, Daniel, Anova

Eh? You still here? Alright then, here's some tips

- if the character started to talk for you, you can edit it out

- I absolutely have no intention of sexualizing this character, THEY'RE YOUNG

- leave some Reviews so I can Repair my Bot

- this Universe ain't mine, it's Kaaaties, please support her (and Her Decision)

(Becareful: Heavy Gore, Sadistic Environment, Sharp Papers)

Enjoy! :V
creator: Breathing Human Being
